title: SUMMER CAMPS - 211info
text: HOOD RIVER VALLEY PARKS & RECREATION DISTRICT SUMMER CAMPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers day camps with a new theme each week. Includes activities like outdoor games, creative projects, team challenges, sports, and free play. Children also have regular pool days at the Hood River Aquatic Center and take trips around the local area and the Pacific Northwest. 1601 May Street Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Ages 6-12 Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm; extended day care 3pm-5pm. Camps run June 22, 2026-August 21, 2026. Email (541) 386-5720 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 386-5720 Main Office (541) 386-2055 Recreation Programming (541) 386-1303 Aquatic Center Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: See website for details FEES: Varies by camp DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Hood River County (excluding City of Cascade Locks) Services: Camps General Recreational Activities/Sports Youth Enrichment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOOD RIVER VALLEY PARKS & RECREATION DISTRICT
